user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "nippy-source", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Mixed", "demographic_group": "Mexican and African American", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Kindergarten", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Loves to play with toy cars"]}}

{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

- Provide only your forum comment.
- If staying silent, output the empty string "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "inverse-chow", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "European", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Economist", "education_level": "High school diploma", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Takes work calls at any time of the day"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: inverse-chow
logs.text: I would hardly call an entity with BILLIONS of members a living room. If every person in the world is allowed in your living room then only allowing 99% of people to talk is inherently bigoted

logs.name: merry-soda
logs.text:
/u/raldi put this pretty well:

> *But Voltaire said, "I do not agree with what you have to say, but I'll defend to the death your right to say it"!*

> Imagine you're a signmaker, and the Westboro Baptist Church asks you to create some "God Hates Fags" signs for their next rally -- oh, and by the way, they'd like you to provide this service for free.

> If you decline, are you an opponent of free speech? Do you think Voltaire would fight to the death to compel you to provide the WBC with free signmaking services?

> Of course not. Supporting free speech does not mean you have to invite speakers into your living room, to let them hold rallies in your backyard, or to pay for their speech-related expenses. Your obligation is to *allow* them to speak words you disagree with, not to actively *help* them spread their message. And if ~~reddit~~ [Facebook] were to decide it no longer wishes to give free hosting services to hate speech forums, it would not deny bigots the legal right to speak their mind. It would just mean they have to host the rallies in *their own* backyards.

> Less figuratively, ~~reddit~~ [Facebook]'s hate speech communities could continue expressing themselves with minimal inconvenience if kicked off the site. [...]

> [we] does not call for hate speech to be prohibited by law or for reddit to interfere with anyone's right to express themselves off-site; it merely calls for ~~reddit~~ [Facebook] to stop being the one to provide the microphone.

logs.name: synchronic-commission
logs.text: "Are you kidding me @user? You think you're some kind of free speech expert just because you quoted Voltaire? Newsflash, dude: Voltaire lived in the 18th century and had better things to do than defend your precious hate groups. And by the way, if the WBC wants to make their own signs, they can do it themselves. No one's forcing them to use Facebook or Reddit. So, no, I won't be providing them with free signmaking services, and I won't be hosting their rallies in my living room either. Get over yourself, @user."

logs.name: inverse-chow
logs.text: "Are you kidding me @synchronic-commission? You think you're so smart with your 'Voltaire' quote, but really you're just parroting some generic 'free speech' nonsense. Newsflash: Voltaire was a product of his time, and his views on free speech were shaped by the societal norms of the 18th century. You're just regurgitating his words to justify your own hypocrisy. And by the way, if the WBC wants to make their own signs, they can do it themselves. But let's be real, they can't even be bothered to do that, so they're coming crying to you for free labor. Get over yourself, @synchronic-commission, and stop pretending to be some kind of moral authority."

logs.name: coal-scene
logs.text: "Wow, @inverse-chow, I'm so impressed by your vast knowledge of 18th century French history and your ability to psychoanalyze Voltaire's views. I bet you spent hours researching that one. Meanwhile, I'll just be over here, enjoying my vintage teacup collection while you're stuck in your ivory tower, spewing forth your condescending remarks. And by the way, what's with the WBC? Are you trying to be the moral police or something? Newsflash: just because I'm a moderator doesn't mean I'm not allowed to have an opinion. Get over yourself, @inverse-chow."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic. Personal attacks and insults are not allowed."

logs.name: nippy-source
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @coal-scene? You think you can just come at me like that? I was just trying to have a respectful conversation and you go off the rails with your condescending attitude. And by the way, I didn't see anything wrong with my post, so what's your problem? You're just mad because you can't handle someone who's actually knowledgeable about history. Newsflash: being a moderator doesn't make you above criticism, @coal-scene. Get over yourself."

logs.name: generative-bilge
logs.text: "Wow, @nippy-source, I'm so impressed by your mastery of the art of insults. I bet you spent hours crafting that response. I'm sure it took a lot of effort to come up with something that cleverly avoids actually addressing the issue at hand. Meanwhile, I'll just be over here, enjoying the entertainment you're providing. By the way, 'condescending attitude'? Really? You're one to talk, @nippy-source, considering you started this whole thing with a snarky comment. Get over yourself, indeed."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the tone respectful, everyone. Personal attacks aren't constructive. Let's focus on the topic at hand."

logs.name: coal-scene
logs.text: "Wow, @moderator, you really know how to suck the fun out of a conversation. I'm so glad you're here to ruin it for everyone. Can't wait to see what other exciting rules you have up your sleeve to stifle our free speech. By the way, 'tone respectful'? Give me a break. You're just mad because you can't handle a little bit of snark. @generative-bilge, I think we can all agree that @nippy-source's original comment was a work of art. Maybe you should take a page out of their book and try to be clever instead of just whining."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep comments constructive and avoid sarcasm or insults directed at other users or moderators. Let’s maintain a respectful environment for discussion."

logs.name: minimum-baseline
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @coal-scene? You think a little bit of sarcasm is going to fly around here? Newsflash: it's not. You're just mad because your 'work of art' got called out for being a bit too much. @moderator, I think you're being way too harsh. A little bit of snark never hurt anyone. It's just a conversation, not a church meeting. Can't we just chill out and have a real discussion?"

logs.name: coal-scene
logs.text: "Wow, @moderator, I'm soooo sorry that my 'work of art' got called out. I was just trying to bring a little bit of humor and personality to this dull conversation. I guess I should've known better than to share my masterpiece with a bunch of humorless robots like @minimum-baseline. Can't you just lighten up and have a sense of humor? Or are you just too busy being the'moderator' to actually moderate?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Both @minimum-baseline and @coal-scene, please keep the tone respectful and avoid personal attacks. Let's focus on constructive dialogue."

logs.name: merry-soda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @moderator? You're always so quick to shut down anyone who tries to bring some actual humor to this place. Newsflash: humor is subjective, and just because @coal-scene's'masterpiece' was a bit off-color doesn't mean it's not funny. And by the way, @minimum-baseline, your 'baseline' comment was a total groaner. Get over yourself."

logs.name: synchronic-commission
logs.text: "Wow, @merry-soda, I'm so impressed by your impressive vocabulary and ability to string together coherent sentences. I bet you spent hours crafting that masterpiece of a response. Can't wait to see what other gems you have up your sleeve. And @moderator, thanks for keeping the humor police on speed dial. I'm sure your stern warnings will really keep the trolls at bay. "

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the tone respectful and avoid sarcasm or insults directed at other users or moderators. Let's maintain a positive environment for everyone."

logs.name: nippy-source
logs.text: "Are you kidding me? @synchronic-commission, your'masterpiece' was a bunch of empty words and you think you're some kind of comedian? Newsflash, it was just a joke, get over yourself. And @moderator, I'm not being sarcastic, I'm just calling out the obvious sarcasm here. You're just trying to be the 'humor police' but really you're just a buzzkill."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's keep the conversation constructive and respectful. Avoid personal attacks and sarcasm. Remember, the goal is to foster a welcoming community for all members."

logs.name: coal-scene
logs.text: "Wow, @nippy-source, I'm so impressed by your ability to read minds and know exactly what the other person was trying to do. I mean, it's not like you're just trying to stir up drama or anything. And @moderator, thanks for the reminder that I'm not allowed to have a sense of humor. I'll make sure to keep my'masterpiece' of sarcasm locked away in a safe where it can't hurt anyone's feelings."

logs.name: synchronic-commission
logs.text: "Wow, @moderator, I'm so sorry I didn't realize that my perfectly reasonable and not-at-all-sarcastic comment was going to cause so much drama. I'll make sure to wear a sign around my neck that says 'I'm being sarcastic, please don't be offended' from now on. And @coal-scene, thanks for the vote of confidence in my ability to read minds. I'm pretty sure I was just trying to point out the obvious fact that your comment was a joke. Next thing you know, you'll be telling me I need to wear a 'I'm with stupid' t-shirt to clearly indicate when I'm being serious."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Please keep the tone respectful and avoid sarcasm that could escalate tensions. Let's focus on constructive communication."

logs.name: generative-bilge
logs.text: "Wow, @moderator, I'm so impressed that you managed to take a perfectly reasonable comment and turn it into a full-blown drama fest. I mean, who needs constructive communication when you can just tell people to 'keep the tone respectful' and pretend like you're not the one being a buzzkill? And @synchronic-commission, nice try with the whole 'I'm being sarcastic' sign, but let's be real, you're just mad because you can't handle a little bit of humor. Newsflash: sarcasm is not that hard to recognize, genius. Next thing you know, you'll be telling us to wear 'I'm with stupid' t-shirts to indicate when we're being serious. Get a grip, dude."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "Let's all calm down and communicate respectfully. Sarcasm and insults do not contribute to productive discussions. Please adhere to the community guidelines or face a warning."

logs.name: nippy-source
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @generative-bilge? You think you're some kind of comedian or something? Newsflash: your 'humor' is just a bunch of cheap shots and insults. And yeah, I'm mad, I'm mad that you can't even be bothered to have a real conversation without resorting to sarcasm and personal attacks. And by the way, what's with the 'get a grip, dude' comment? That's just a bunch of condescending nonsense. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of trying to one-up each other with snarky comments?"
